_readme: Copy this file to ~/.friday/mcp.json and edit. COSMOS connects at boot
(or via the mcp tool: action=reload). ${VAR} expands from the environment,
so tokens can live in backend/.env instead of this file.
Gating: destructiveHint confirms in both modes; everything else confirms
in ask mode and is always blocked in unattended scheduled runs.
readOnlyHint lets a tool run free ONLY when you set "trust": true on
the server — annotations are server-controlled, so untrusted servers'
tools always confirm. For servers with no annotations, add a
"read_tools": [names] allowlist so their reads run free (trust required);
any tool not listed still confirms.

github._note: GitHub MCP server. Put a PAT in backend/.env as GITHUB_PAT, flip enabled to true, then run 'mcp reload'.
